ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_caption" TEXT /* Full caption of the case (e.g., Goodman v. Epstein) */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court where the case was heard */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the case was decided */,
  "investment_contract_found" INTEGER /* Whether an investment contract was found in the case */,
  "object_or_interest" TEXT /* Object or interest involved in the case (e.g., Limited Partnership Interest) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the case (e.g., Real Estate) */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Detailed finding and legal reasoning of the case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., civil, criminal, regulatory) */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "date_decided" TEXT /* Date the case was decided */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge who presided over the case */,
  "legal_counsel" TEXT /* Names of the legal counsel involved */,
  "parties_involved" TEXT /* Detailed list of parties involved in the case */,
  "case_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_court FOREIGN KEY ("court") REFERENCES courts ("court_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_object_or_interest FOREIGN KEY ("object_or_interest") REFERENCES interest_types ("interest_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the industry sector */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical industry categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_types" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest type (e.g., Limited Partnership Interest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interest type */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Regulatory status or compliance requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the court */,
  "court_location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (e.g., federal, state, appellate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the finding belongs to */,
  "finding_text" TEXT /* Full text of the finding */,
  "key_points" TEXT /* Key points of the finding */,
  "legal_reasoning" TEXT /* Legal reasoning behind the finding */,
  "finding_date" TEXT /* Date the finding was made */,
  "finding_status" TEXT /* Status of the finding (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "judicial_opinion" TEXT /* Full text of the judicial opinion or ruling */,
  "legal_authority" TEXT /* Legal authority or precedent cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_findings_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legal analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case relation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that cites or references another case */,
  "related_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related case */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., citation, cross-reference) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relation */,
  "relation_date" TEXT /* Date the relation was established */,
  "relation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_relations_related_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword for the case */,
  "keyword_weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the keyword in the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_keywords_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
